package rulecoverage

func PositiveSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookup() string {
    ruleID := "select_or_get_inside_loop_lookup"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "ORM lookups (Select, Get, First, etc.) executed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
